emails.subject: Online Letter Form
emails.body: Online Letter Form At Mark Taylor's request, I am attaching Leslie Hansen's form of override letter when a GTC will "override" the master agreement for online transactions. How are you doing Justy?

emails.subject: Online Letter Form

emails.subject: Re: Online Letter Form
emails.body: Re: Online Letter Form thanks tana! ...i'm just about surviving......however dear old edmund suffering a bit he's out of action 'til October....it must be called "EOLitis"! ..we're off to florence for the weekend for a wedding which will be lovely ..will see "David" again...what a treat! TooTOO J From: Tana Jones on 30/08/2000 15:32 CDT
